comment.body: Rising volatility will eventually cap the upside. The call wing would be a short call. So as IV increases dealers delta goes more negative causing reflexive buying (thats why we've been squeezing like this). However eventually as IV increases it starts to work against the position (IV rising on high delta starts to cap upside)
comment.raw_body: Rising volatility will eventually cap the upside. The call wing would be a short call.
